name: BloodHound/Active Directory Reconnaissance Tool Execution Detected
description: Detection of Active Directory reconnaissance tool execution (e.g., SharpHound.exe or extensive PowerShell AD queries), indicating an adversary mapping the environment.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname where the activity occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: ProcessName
parameters.description: The name of the process that executed the command (e.g., SharpHound.exe, powershell.exe).

parameters.name: ParentProcessName
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that launched the command.

parameters.name: ParentCommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the parent process.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID (expected to be 1).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The name of the Sysmon rule that triggered the event, if applicable.
